Users can view blasts for their events.name: Users can view blasts for their events
Users can view blasts for their events.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM events
  WHERE ((events.id = event_blasts.event_id) AND (events.user_id = auth.uid()))))

Users can create blasts for their events.name: Users can create blasts for their events

Event owners can view event invites.name: Event owners can view event invites
Event owners can view event invites.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM events e
  WHERE ((e.id = event_invites.event_id) AND (e.user_id = auth.uid()))))

Event owners can insert event invites.name: Event owners can insert event invites

Users can view event registrations.name: Users can view event registrations
Users can view event registrations.using:
((auth.uid() = user_id) OR (auth.uid() IN ( SELECT events.user_id
   FROM events
  WHERE (events.id = event_registrations.event_id))))
